title: Agent handoff map

handoffs.input: interview task, operator intent, or regression review request

handoffs.output: worker-style run result and parsed playback metrics

handoffs.input: sample unit, labels, recording, and device profile
handoffs.output: decision score, warnings, and review reasons
storyboards, timelines, Markdown, JSON, and static site assets
GitHub Pages bundle and interview walkthrough documents

interview_message: The system is framed as an agent-ready workflow: orchestration decides the work, automation executes it, and the sampler produces verifiable evidence.
